citizen.scan_placeholder: Take a photo or type an item name

onboarding.step1_desc: Get hyper-local real-time AQI updates and AI health advisories specifically for your local street node.
onboarding.step2_desc: Snap pictures of waste nodes to classify them accurately. Earn Eco Credits for your environmental stewardship.
onboarding.step3_desc: Climb your local ward leaderboard. Higher precision yields better environment benchmarks for your family.
